status: targeted reconstructed critical-path validation; full repository CI and TESS execution pending
validated_paths: shared six-duration physical and surrogate search family
Wilson intervals for empirical significant completeness
scale-separated target variability and correlation strata

scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.issue: surrogate nulls initially searched fewer duration templates than physical recoveries
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.risk: anti-conservative empirical p-values from a smaller null search space
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.correction: one shared duration-grid function plus evidence validation of root and per-target declarations

scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.issue: significant completeness lacked a sampling interval
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.risk: overconfident interpretation of four injections per physical cell
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.correction: 95 percent Wilson interval for empirically significant completeness

scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.issue: brightening controls followed injected duration rather than the winning recovery template
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.correction: record recovered and control template durations and match controls to the winning template

scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.issue: nested experiment axes accepted one-shot generators
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.correction: freeze all physical experiment axes to reusable tuples before nested iteration

scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.issue: evidence counts were coercible with int(value)
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.risk: fractional, boolean, or string counts could masquerade as valid integer trial totals
scientific_defects_found_and_corrected.correction: accept only exact JSON integer values or mathematically integral finite floats

local_validation_note: An intermediate local mirror run produced failures because a compact adapter patch accidentally scoped variables inside an error branch. The adapter was corrected and the complete targeted suite then passed 36/36. The GitHub source file uses explicit multiline control flow and did not contain that compact adapter error.
limitations: The targeted suite reconstructs the critical v0.7 path and is not the full repository test suite.
The GitHub-hosted jobs remained queued without a runner when this record was frozen.
No Phase 0.7 six-target TESS flight-data result is claimed here.
